Module me.stringdotjar.flixelgdx.core
Package me.stringdotjar.flixelgdx.input.keyboard

Class FlixelKeyInputManager

java.lang.Object
me.stringdotjar.flixelgdx.input.keyboard.FlixelKeyInputManager
public class FlixelKeyInputManager extends Object
Keyboard input manager backed by Gdx.input.

Access via Flixel.keys after the framework is initialized.

Tracks pressed keys via an internal InputProcessor. If you use a custom input processor, add the one from getInputProcessor() first to a multiplexer so key state stays correct.

  • Field Details

    • enabled

      public boolean enabled
      Whether keyboard input is currently enabled. When false, all key checks return false.

  • Constructor Details

    • FlixelKeyInputManager

      public FlixelKeyInputManager()

  • Method Details

    • getInputProcessor

      public com.badlogic.gdx.InputProcessor getInputProcessor()
      Returns the input processor that tracks key state. Add this first to an InputMultiplexer (before other processors) so key state is correct.

    • update

      public void update()
      Updates internal key state. Must be called once per frame (e.g. from the game loop) so that justReleased(int) and firstJustPressed() / firstJustReleased() work correctly.

      Syncs currentPressedKeys from Gdx.input so that firstPressed(), firstJustPressed() and firstJustReleased() work even when the manager's getInputProcessor() is not in the input chain. Call endFrame() at the end of the frame so "just pressed/released" detection works next frame.

    • endFrame

      public void endFrame()
      Captures current key state as "previous" for the next frame. Must be called once per frame at the end of the update cycle (after all state updates) so that firstJustPressed() and firstJustReleased() work correctly next frame.

    • pressed

      public boolean pressed(int key)
      Returns whether the given key is currently held down.
      Parameters:
      key - The key to check if it is pressed. (e.g. FlixelKey.A, Input.Keys)
      Returns:
      true if the key is pressed and input is enabled.

    • justPressed

      public boolean justPressed(int key)
      Returns whether the given key was just pressed this frame.
      Parameters:
      key - key code
      Returns:
      true if the key was just pressed and input is enabled.

    • justReleased

      public boolean justReleased(int key)
      Returns whether the given key was just released this frame.
      Parameters:
      key - key code
      Returns:
      true if the key was pressed last frame and is not pressed now, and input is enabled.

    • anyPressed

      public boolean anyPressed(int... keys)
      Returns whether at least one of the given keys is currently pressed.
      Parameters:
      keys - key codes to check
      Returns:
      true if any key in the array is pressed and input is enabled.

    • anyJustPressed

      public boolean anyJustPressed(int... keys)
      Returns whether at least one of the given keys was just pressed this frame.
      Parameters:
      keys - key codes to check
      Returns:
      true if any key in the array was just pressed and input is enabled

    • anyJustReleased

      public boolean anyJustReleased(int... keys)
      Returns whether at least one of the given keys was just released this frame.
      Parameters:
      keys - Keys to check if they were just released.
      Returns:
      true if any key in the given list was just released and input is enabled.

    • firstPressed

      public int firstPressed()
      Returns the key code that was pressed first (chronologically) among those currently held, or FlixelKey.NONE if none.
      Returns:
      First pressed key code, or FlixelKey.NONE if none.

    • firstJustPressed

      public int firstJustPressed()
      Returns the first key code that was just pressed this frame, or FlixelKey.NONE if none.
      Returns:
      First just-pressed key code, or FlixelKey.NONE if none.

    • firstJustReleased

      public int firstJustReleased()
      Returns the first key code that was just released this frame, or FlixelKey.NONE if none.
      Returns:
      First just-released key code, or FlixelKey.NONE if none.

    • reset

      public void reset()
      Resets internal state (e.g. clears pressed key tracking). Does not change enabled.
